'''pazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynurenine|kynurenine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynurenine|kynurenine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhækæth|pæzhækæth]] || [[word:pæzhækæj|pæzhækæj]] || [[word:pæzhækæsh|pæzhækæsh]] || [[word:pæzhækæ|pæzhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhazhakath|pazhazhakath]] || [[word:pazhazhakaj|pazhazhakaj]] || [[word:pazhazhakash|pazhazhakash]] || [[word:pazhazhaka|pazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhakath|pazhakath]] || [[word:pazhakaj|pazhakaj]] || [[word:pazhakash|pazhakash]] || [[word:pazhaka|pazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhafkath|pazhafkath]] || [[word:pazhafkaj|pazhafkaj]] || [[word:pazhafkash|pazhafkash]] || [[word:pazhafkaf|pazhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhakatha|pazhakatha]] || [[word:pazhakaja|pazhakaja]] || [[word:pazhakasha|pazhakasha]] || [[word:pazhakaka|pazhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhakath|pazhakath]] || [[word:pazhakaj|pazhakaj]] || [[word:pazhakash|pazhakash]] || [[word:pazhaka|pazhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhakathal|pazhakathal]] || [[word:pazhakajal|pazhakajal]] || [[word:pazhakashal|pazhakashal]] || [[word:pazhakakal|pazhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhakathatha|pazhakathatha]] || [[word:pazhakajaja|pazhakajaja]] || [[word:pazhakashasha|pazhakashasha]] || [[word:pazhakaka|pazhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhakathan|pazhakathan]] || [[word:pazhakajan|pazhakajan]] || [[word:pazhakashan|pazhakashan]] || [[word:pazhakakan|pazhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhakathaoro|pazhakathaoro]] || [[word:pazhakajaoro|pazhakajaoro]] || [[word:pazhakashaoro|pazhakashaoro]] || [[word:pazhakakaoro|pazhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
